rows.label: qev013801_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Hmm? Could you be the BLADE
who came to answer my request?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0034
rows.name:
I have an issue that must be
resolved urgently, but I was
troubled because no one was coming.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0035
rows.name:
I would like to explain the details
right away, but... Right... Before
that, let me ask you one thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0003
rows.name:
I believe the current NLA is a bizarre
city mixed with aliens... I want to
hear your thoughts on that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_JNK0010
rows.name: Romanticize

rows.label: qev013801_SEL0011
rows.name: Wax poetic about NLA and its residents.

rows.label: qev013801_JNK0020
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: qev013801_SEL0021
rows.name:
Talk up how all NLA
citizens work together.

rows.label: qev013801_JNK0030
rows.name: Criticize

rows.label: qev013801_SEL0031
rows.name:
Complain that NLA is
wretched and unwholesome.

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hmm. It's not a bad thing to love the
city we built with our own hands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0005
rows.name:
I have also watched the city of
NLA, and felt both impressed and
anxious at the same time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0006
rows.name:
Don't you think those who deviate
from the general rules should be
strictly cracked down upon?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0007
rows.name:
To think you'd reach
such a conclusion...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0008
rows.name:
Missing the forest for the
trees is an understatement.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0009
rows.name:
Don't you think those who deviate
from the general rules should be
strictly cracked down upon?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0010
rows.name:
It seems you are an individual
of excellent insight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0011
rows.name:
I have also watched the city of
NLA, and felt both impressed and
anxious at the same time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0012
rows.name:
Don't you think those who deviate
from the general rules should be
strictly cracked down upon?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_JNK0110
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev013801_SEL0111
rows.name:
Ask Alex what he intends to
do about the lawbreakers.

rows.label: qev013801_JNK0120
rows.name: Challenge

rows.label: qev013801_SEL0121
rows.name:
Question if humans have the
right to judge other races.

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0013
rows.name: It's a simple matter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0014
rows.name:
Since they live in an Earthling
city, the aliens should also abide
by the general rules of this city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0015
rows.name:
Cars stop at a red light, and in this
city, cars drive on the right side.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0016
rows.name:
Garbage must be thrown in trash cans,
and the city must be kept clean.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0017
rows.name:
Where is this? NLA. The moment they took
a step, they entered our territory.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0018
rows.name:
Therefore, regardless of their reasons,
they must obey the city's general rules.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0019
rows.name:
Do you understand? That is what
the law is. If it collapses,
we humanity have no future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0020
rows.name:
But... how is it now? Aren't
the aliens strutting around
NLA as if they own the place?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0021
rows.name:
So, as a first step, I want to
gather the Ma-non, hold a meeting,
and teach them our general rules.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0022
rows.name:
What do you say? To make this city more
noble, could I ask for your cooperation?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0023
rows.name:
Comrade, I have no words
to express my gratitude.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0024
rows.name:
I will call out to them on my end as
well. It would help if you could bring
about three creatures over too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_JNK0210
rows.name: Censure[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_SEL0211
rows.name:
Ask if he counts the
Ma-non as creatures.

rows.label: qev013801_JNK0220
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev013801_SEL0221
rows.name: Happily agree to go collar some Ma-non.

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0025
rows.name:
Forgive my rudeness, I misspoke.
I myself am not yet used to
them or beings like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0026
rows.name:
Ah, I'm counting on you. Three Ma-non.
Thank you for your cooperation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0027
rows.name:
I want to gather the Ma-non, hold a
meeting, and teach them our general rules.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0028
rows.name:
Please gather about three Ma-non
for me. I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0029
rows.name: You brought them as planned. Excellent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0030
rows.name:
I intend to invite them to a special
place now and teach them the general
rules of an Earthling city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0031
rows.name:
By the time we adjourn, probably all
aliens will come to understand us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0032
rows.name:
...Come to the summit of Headwater
Summit in the Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013801_MSG0033
rows.name:
I will hammer the single truth
that can only be taught there
into their small bodies.[ST:wait ]
